parameters.query:
with week_entries as (
  select
    s.owner_id,
    s.site_name,
    wl.waste_type,
    wl.disposal_method,
    sum(coalesce(wl.quantity,0)) as total_quantity,
    string_agg(distinct wl.unit, '/') as units,
    count(*) as entry_count
  from waste_log wl
  join sites s on s.id = wl.site_id and s.status = 'active'
  where wl.date between (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date and (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date
  group by s.owner_id, s.site_name, wl.waste_type, wl.disposal_method
)
select
  we.owner_id,
  p.phone_number as owner_phone,
  sum(we.entry_count) as total_entries,
  string_agg(
    '- ' || we.site_name || ': ' || we.waste_type || ' (' || we.disposal_method || ') - ' ||
    case when we.total_quantity > 0 then we.total_quantity || ' ' || coalesce(we.units,'') else we.entry_count || ' entr' || (case when we.entry_count=1 then 'y' else 'ies' end) end,
    E'\n' order by we.site_name
  ) as digest_body
from week_entries we
join profiles p on p.id = we.owner_id
group by we.owner_id, p.phone_number;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "number": $json.owner_phone.replace(/\D/g, ''), "text": "♻️ *Waste Disposal Compliance Digest*

" + $json.total_entries + " waste log entr" + ($json.total_entries == 1 ? 'y' : 'ies') + " this week:

" + $json.digest_body + "

Open Mutiso.AI to review." } }}
